final:
module RefModule (  
    input [15:0] data_in,  
    output reg [15:0] data_out,  
    input we,  
    input [3:0] addr,  
    input clk  
);  
    reg [15:0] obf_memory [15:0]; // 16 locations of 16 bits each  

    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        if (we)  
            obf_memory[addr] <= data_in; // Write data to obf_memory  
        else  
            data_out <= obf_memory[addr]; // Read data from obf_memory  
    end  
endmodule
